title: rpl/dodag: DodagMembershipState<S> typestate is unused in production code
description: In dodag.rs:80-143, the typestate DodagMembershipState<S> is defined but only used in tests. Production code uses DodagState with a runtime role field. Either commit to typestate throughout (refactor DodagState) or remove until actually needed. Currently it's dead weight that tests exercise but production ignores.
